claim: Pi (minimalist open-source coding agent) fixes Claude Code bloat: simple foundational core with extensible architecture; users can request Pi to add features without inheriting system-wide complexity
actionable: Use Pi instead of Claude Code for control over system prompt and extensions; ask Pi to add specific features (MCP, sub-agents) directly into itself, avoiding vendor bloat
source_title: Pi Coding Agent + Archon: Build ANY AI Coding Workflow

claim: Claude Code's system prompt changes with each release and is difficult/impossible to control; Pi's simple architecture makes system prompt fully controllable and stable
actionable: If you need deterministic, controllable system prompts across releases, use Pi instead of Claude Code; verify your system prompt doesn't change between sessions
source_title: Pi Coding Agent + Archon: Build ANY AI Coding Workflow

claim: Pi supports any LLM (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Mistral, Grok, etc.) by setting API keys; enables multi-provider workflows without vendor lock-in
actionable: Use Pi with {slash}login to configure multiple LLM subscriptions; use {slash}model to swap providers per task; compose workflows with best model for each phase
source_title: Pi Coding Agent + Archon: Build ANY AI Coding Workflow

claim: Pi's extension marketplace (npm-based) allows single-command installation of third-party skills, prompts, themes; users can also ask Pi to build custom extensions
actionable: Install Pi extensions via npm; search marketplace at npm.org/search?q=pi-; ask Pi directly to build custom extensions for your workflow
source_title: Pi Coding Agent + Archon: Build ANY AI Coding Workflow

claim: Archon (harness builder) now supports Pi as third coding agent alongside Claude Code and Codex; enables packaging AI coding workflows as reusable YAML-based blueprints
actionable: Use Archon to define multi-step workflows (plan, implement, validate) that can run Pi, Claude Code, or Codex; share workflows as YAML; run in parallel across team
source_title: Pi Coding Agent + Archon: Build ANY AI Coding Workflow

claim: Plan-Implement-Validate (PiV) loop using Planotator extension: Planotator renders plan.md in web UI, allows inline comments on specific lines, agent iterates plan based on feedback
actionable: Use Planotator extension for planning phase; generate plan.md, render in UI, collect feedback via inline comments, agent revises before moving to implementation
source_title: Pi Coding Agent + Archon: Build ANY AI Coding Workflow

claim: Archon + Pi workflow supports mixing model providers between nodes: use Claude for planning, GPT for implementation, Sonnet for validation; compose per task strengths
actionable: Override provider at individual Archon node level; use strongest model for reasoning (planning, logic), fastest/cheapest for UI/low-stakes tasks (implementation/validation)
source_title: Pi Coding Agent + Archon: Build ANY AI Coding Workflow
